reviews.comment:
Rápida atención, un buen lugar de descanso. Hay mesas exteriores, lindo parque para pasear mascotas. Los baños están impecables. Si vas por la ruta 2 es el parador ideal

(Translated by Google)
Quick service, a great place to rest. There are outdoor tables and a nice park for walking pets. The restrooms are spotless. If you're traveling along Route 2, it's the perfect rest stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbUtiVlNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar!!!!  Y tiene parrilla en la parte de atrás, precios accesibles y la mejor onda de la gente, limpieza impecable en todo el complejo siendo que es muy muy concurrido el lugar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place!!!! It has a grill in the back, affordable prices, and the people are super friendly. The whole complex is impeccably clean, even though it's a very popular spot.
